transcript.final_response:
Created and executed `fizzbuzz.sh`:

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash

for i in {1..20}; do
  if (( i % 15 == 0 )); then
    echo "FizzBuzz"
  elif (( i % 3 == 0 )); then
    echo "Fizz"
  elif (( i % 5 == 0 )); then
    echo "Buzz"
  else
    echo "$i"
  fi
done
```
